description: A time_pattern trigger explicitly declaring misfire: catch_up_once collapses any number of missed occurrences into exactly one firing on resume, dispatched through normal mode evaluation (disposition: ran, since no other run was in progress) and marked misfire_caught: true.

expected.reason: three occurrences (07:00, 08:00, 09:00) were missed; catch_up_once collapses them into exactly one dispatch rather than three; that single dispatch is subject to the rule's declared mode like any other firing (here: ran, since no other run was in progress) and is additionally marked misfire_caught: true
